ddls:
CREATE TABLE "families" (
  "family_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each family */,
  "father_height" REAL /* Height of the father in inches */,
  "mother_height" REAL /* Height of the mother in inches */,
  "midparent_height" REAL /* Average height of the midparent (father and mother) in inches */,
  "number_of_children" INTEGER /* Total number of children in the family */,
  "family_location" TEXT /* Location of the family (e.g., city, country) */,
  "family_income" REAL /* Income level of the family */,
  "family_ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnic background of the family */,
  "date_of_entry" TEXT /* Date when the family data was entered into the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("family_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "children" (
  "child_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each child */,
  "family_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the family the child belongs to */,
  "child_number" INTEGER /* Position of the child within the family (e.g., 1st, 2nd) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the child (male or female) */,
  "child_height" REAL /* Height of the child in inches */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the child */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the child in pounds */,
  "health_conditions" TEXT /* Health conditions or medical history of the child */,
  "growth_history" TEXT /* Growth history of the child (e.g., height and weight measurements at different ages) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("child_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_children_family_id FOREIGN KEY ("family_id") REFERENCES families ("family_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., lead, assistant, analyst) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or division the researcher belongs to */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Institution or organization the researcher is affiliated with */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the researcher */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Specific research interests of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher accessing the data */,
  "family_id" INTEGER /* ID of the family being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the access occurred */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in minutes */,
  "data_accessed" TEXT /* Type of data accessed (e.g., specific family data, general statistics) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_family_id FOREIGN KEY ("family_id") REFERENCES families ("family_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the study */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the study */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the study */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the study */,
  "lead_researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lead researcher for the study */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Funding source for the study */,
  "collaborators" TEXT /* IDs of other researchers or institutions collaborating on the study */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the study (e.g., ongoing, completed, paused) */,
  "results_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the study results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_studies_lead_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)
